title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 16 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 16 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 16 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/05/2022
May 16th, 2022 CFR Qingdao, USD/dry tonne DCE iron ore futures rose largely by 3.85% today，the main contract closed 834.5. thequotation in the morning was increased by 5-10 yuan/mt from last Friday. Some traders adopt separate quotations, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
